title: AI Editorial Black & White
description: Creates a clean modern black-and-white editorial portrait.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a modern black-and-white editorial portrait. Preserve recognizable identity, facial structure, expression, pose, camera angle, framing, and natural skin texture. Use refined studio or available-light contrast, elegant tonal separation, crisp eyes, soft background falloff, subtle grain, and premium magazine-quality monochrome realism.
negative_prompt: color, color tint, text, captions, logos, watermarks, changed identity, extra people, distorted face, plastic skin, extreme beauty filter, malformed hands, duplicate limbs, low contrast, muddy shadows, low quality, blurry, cartoon, illustration
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. clean studio contrast, fine art monochrome...
